text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what!? 
E-Everyone, what are you——!?

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe～ Surprised? 
You can thank Class Rep Bakushin for the idea!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed!! Bouquet-san!! You have done so, so, 
SO much so we could enjoy tonight's Droite!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We present you with this dress, and this bouquet!! 
This is from all of us—— 
A great big special, blooming gold star for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for all the advice, Bouquet-san! 
Because of you, Flight-san and I could dance to our heart's content!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
It was a crazy tall order for us to ask to run through the dance hall… 
But you still put everything you had into making it happen!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget about us. Thanks for worrying so much about us, Bouquet! 
Hehe, you even went all the way up to the mountains for our sake——

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I realized something incredibly important. 
It was all because you were there by our side, Bouquet-san!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
——Thanks from the rest of us on the committee, too. 
Your theme for the Droite made it a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
All these dates gave each other those blessed bouquets. 
Everybody had such a happy smile on their faces!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your kind wish to give everyone blessings… 
You made this Droite a really special night.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: …………Everyone——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all so much—— I will treasure these flowers, and all your 
kind thoughts—— I'm honored to accept them all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(…I may not be able to bloom as proudly as they 
do on the dance floor—— At least, not yet.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(But, if I continue caring for the people dearest to me, helping the 
smallest of buds bloom, one by one——)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps one day, those buds will form a bouquet. 
Like what I saw tonight…)

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
——Okay, that's it for our very special Droite Surprise Blessing Time!! 
And you know what that means!

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
It's time for what you've all been waiting for. 
The exhibition dance!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: ……Okay. Let's go, Bakushin O-chan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course, Flight-san!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Tonight was so amazing! You all shined so bright! 
Tact-san, Heart-san, Bouquet-san, and everyone else too!!!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sorry to say the brightest stars in the sky tonight—— 
——Are going to be the two of us!
